name: Ghanaian Pidgin English
notes: Ghanaian Pidgin English, an English-lexifier West African pidgin/creole. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. The language is written in the Latin script but has NO standardised orthography — writers use ad-hoc English-based spellings, so no letter-to-phoneme mapping can be claimed with confidence. A standardised (e.g. Naija/ NBTT-style) orthography would be required as input before a grapheme map is meaningful.

location.notes: Glottolog's representative point for Ghanaian Pidgin English.
